---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug in nCompose
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `ncompose convert "..." -f react --llm deepseek`
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or incorrect output.

## Figma component details

- **Component type**: (COMPONENT_SET / single frame / multi-section page / chart)
- **Variant count**: (e.g., 12 variants across Size, Style, State axes)
- **Special properties**: (e.g., nested instances, auto-layout, boolean variants)

## Output framework

- [ ] React
- [ ] Vue
- [ ] Svelte
- [ ] Angular
- [ ] Solid

## Environment

- **OS**: (e.g., macOS 15.1, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11)
- **Node.js version**: (e.g., 22.12.0)
- **nCompose version**: (e.g., 0.1.0)
- **LLM provider**: (e.g., deepseek, claude, openai)

## Screenshots or code output

If applicable, paste the generated code or attach screenshots showing the issue.

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem (e.g., Figma file link if shareable, related issues).
